title: Pursue FlexiSpot first for price proof
body: Maya is closest and most likely to land near $195. Use that reply as leverage for the better Uplift desk.

title: Pursue Uplift next — it's the better desk
body: Daniel's listing has been up 14 days and dropped from $300. A polite $205 with FlexiSpot proof should land.

title: Craigslist seller has weaker trust signals
body: Email-only contact, no sales history. Worth a polite first message, but lower priority.
